title: Procedures for the disinfection of stock culture of duckweed
author: CARLONI, SERENA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol describes a disinfection procedure specifically elaborated for duckweed plants to obtain stock of plant cultures nearly free of parasites or pathogens to be used for ecotoxicological assays.
steps_raw: This protocol describes a disinfection procedure specifically elaborated for duckweed plants to obtain stock of plant cultures nearly free of parasites or pathogens to be used for ecotoxicological assays.
